title: ipv6_addr.h struct in6_addr detection is fragile
description: ipv6_addr.h:42-59 attempts to detect if struct in6_addr is already defined using multiple guard macros (_NETINET_IN_H, _NETINET_IN_H_, __NETINET_IN_H__, etc). This is inherently fragile across platforms. Comment could acknowledge this is best-effort and may need extension for new platforms.
